primary_sources.name: Medicare Program; End-Stage Renal Disease Prospective Payment System, Payment for Renal Dialysis Services; Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Foundational regulation establishing the ESRD PPS bundled payment system

primary_sources.name: CY 2024 End-Stage Renal Disease Prospective Payment System Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Current payment rates, case-mix adjusters, and QIP requirements

primary_sources.name: Medicare Claims Processing Manual Chapter 8 - Outpatient ESRD Services
primary_sources.relevance: Detailed billing and coverage requirements for ESRD PPS services

primary_sources.name: ESRD Quality Incentive Program Technical Specifications
primary_sources.relevance: QIP measures, scoring methodology, and payment reduction calculations

secondary_sources.name: The Economics of Dialysis Care Under Medicare's Bundled Payment System
secondary_sources.relevance: Analysis of PPS impact on dialysis facility operations and patient outcomes

gaps: Limited recent peer-reviewed analysis of PPS case-mix adjuster effectiveness
Sparse literature on outlier payment utilization patterns
